name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_REGION.title: SigNoz Cloud Region
SIGNOZ_REGION.description: Your SigNoz Cloud region code: us, us2, eu, eu2, in, or in2. Find it under Settings -> Ingestion (region reference: https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/).
